# Imagined Inventory: onboarding-screens

**Project:** tradeguruelectrical
**Created:** 2026-03-15
**Generated by:** `/imagine-inventory`
**Vision:** 4-page onboarding carousel (3 mode introductions + final CTA) with skip, persistence, dark mode, and HTML parity

---

## Instructions

This is a **forward-looking TODO inventory** — none of these items exist yet. It represents everything that needs to be built to deliver the onboarding flow.

### Status definitions
| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `todo` | Not started — needs to be built |
| `in-progress` | Currently being worked on |
| `done` | Built and working — file path noted |
| `cut` | Descoped — decided not to build |
| `blocked` | Can't start until dependency is done |

---

## Build Order

### Phase 1 — Reusable page components
| # | Item | Type | Why first |
|---|------|------|-----------|
| 1 | OnboardingPageView | view | Reusable template — both OnboardingView and FinalPage depend on this pattern |
| 2 | OnboardingFinalPageView | view | Final page has different layout (buttons vs plain text) |

### Phase 2 — Container + gate
| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 3 | OnboardingView | view | TabView container that hosts pages 1-4 |
| 4 | ContentView gate | modification | Wire the @AppStorage check to show/hide onboarding |

### Phase 3 — HTML parity
| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 5 | Component picker entry | html | Mandatory Rule #2 compliance |
| 6 | Onboarding renderer | html | Full carousel preview in browser |
